A) 88% B) 75%
C) 81% D) 71%
Page-254, Easy
78. Carbon cycling occurs through
A) Atmosphere
B) Living & dead organism
C) Ocean
D) All of the above
Page-254, Easy
79. How much at carbon in fixed annually in
the biosphere through photosynthesis?
A) 8 x 1012kg B) 4 x 1012kg
C) 4 x 1013kg D) 4.9 x 10 kg
Page-254, Easy

atmosphere is/are-
A) Burning of wood B) Forest fire
C) Fossil fuel D) All of the above
Page-254, Easy

increased the rate of released of CO; into
the atmosphere by
A) Rapid deforestation
B) Massive burning of fossil
C) Both A and B
D) None of the above

Cycle

A) Biological membranes
B) Nucleic acids
C) Cellular energy transfer unit
D) All of the above

A) Carbon
B) Nitrogen
C) Phosphorus

A) Rock B) Plants
